calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-05-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday, Feb. 5, 2015 in Department 525:
Holden Green, Esq., (408) 451-8449, Specially Appearance for Appellant/Defendant David Pang who is also present.
Huy Tran, Respondent/Plaintiff appears as pro per.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn. Huy Tran testifies on his behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced: Evidence not marked - Honda rear view camera with plastic wrapper (actual item):
Exhibit (A) Various documents - bay register, picture of a rear view camera, transaction details, etc.

Counsel Green testifies on behalf of David Pang and also counsel examins Mr. Pang. The following documentary evidence are introduced:
Exhibit (1) - various documents - payment comfirmation, 4 pages -tracking information back to seller, item listed on ebay, item listed rearview mirror.

Closing arguments by Mr. Tran.
Closing arguments by counsel Green.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly evidence retained by the Court. Rear view camera(actual item) returned back to plaintiff Tran in Open Court.

Judge Pro Tempore: Elliott Myles; Clerk J. Kong; matter not reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Dec-12-2014 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Oct-07-2014 Reset From Oct-23-14 To Dec-12-14 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 506
